race.comment: It looks another ideal race for SHE'S AN ARTIST (3) who has always promised very good ability. She hasn't quite delivered on that to date but starting $1.30 and being beaten under a length by Bridal Waltz is outstanding form for this. She did what she had to do first up and can go on with it now. VERDOUX (9) resumed with a strong win first up at Caulfield, getting home strongly late to score. He drops half a kilo off that and sets up well here. HEZDARNHOTTOO (8) was first up off a 13 month spell at Rosehill and gave a great sight out in front, beaten under a length. He should strip much fitter from that and will be hard to get past with Bowman booked. PRESS DOWN (1) resumes for a new yard. He's lost his way a bit but his best sets a decent benchmark and he could be a blowout hope at big odds. CASTELLAR (6) is racing well and has claims again.
